title: Manufacturing Engineer - Nalco Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Nalco Holdings Services - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Nalco Holdings Services in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nalco Holdings Services:
Nalco Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nalco Holdings Services!
